title: exostema corymbiferum
intro: Exostema corymbiferum, also known as the wild coffee or Jamaican wild coffee, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce fever, relieve headaches, and act as a natural diuretic. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. Exostema corymbiferum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
